css_prompt.context: Create sleek modern CSS for SAGE MINT school theme. Must implement 6 specific 3D effects and micro-interactions using pure CSS + minimal JS. Mobile-first responsive.

effects_3d.name: Card 3D Tilt
effects_3d.css: transform-style: preserve-3d; perspective: 1000px; transition: transform 0.3s ease;

effects_3d.name: Floating Elements
effects_3d.css: @keyframes float { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(5deg); } }

effects_3d.name: Layered Depth Hero
effects_3d.css: position: absolute; z-index variations; will-change: transform;
effects_3d.js_hook: Mouse parallax movement (back slow, front fast)

effects_3d.name: Flip Card
effects_3d.css: position: relative; transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.2, 0.2, 1); .front, .back { backface-visibility: hidden; } .back { transform: rotateY(180deg); } &:hover { transform: rotateY(180deg); }

effects_3d.name: Glassmorphism
effects_3d.css: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);

effects_3d.name: 3D Wave Divider
effects_3d.css: SVG path with fill: var(--surface); min 2 layers with different opacity (0.5 and 1) for depth

micro_interactions: Buttons: hover scale(1.03) + shadow, active scale(0.97)
Nav links: underline slide from left (::after width 0→100%)
Social icons: hover rotate(10deg) + color change to accent
Inputs: focus border-color secondary + box-shadow glow
Images: hover zoom scale(1.1) with overflow hidden container
animations_scroll: Section fade-in: opacity 0→1, translateY(30px→0), threshold 0.15, once:true
Staggered cards: delay 100ms per item using :nth-child or JS
technical_constraints: CSS Variables in :root for all colors
Transform and opacity for animations (GPU accelerated)
Contain: layout style paint for complex sections
css_prompt.output: Complete <style> block with organized sections: Variables, Reset, Utilities, Components, Sections, Responsive, Animations
